2025-10-12T18:07:11.0121850Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/devpool-directory/devpool-directory

2025-10-12T18:07:11.0196828Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
